pages_processed.topic: OSHA, FDA, and ANSI Requirements Overview

critical_insights: Manufacturers must provide external interlocks on Class 3B and 4 lasers
No federal mandate for end users to actually use interlocks
Interlock connectors often shipped in shorted state
ANSI Z136.1 adoption effectively adopts FLPPS
LSO must monitor and enforce laser safety for in-house builds

regulatory_overlaps.OSHA_enforces: ANSI Z136.1 through General Duty Clause

key_requirements: All Class 3B and Class 4 lasers must have external interlocks
In-house lasers should meet FLPPS intent
Sections 4.3.1-4.3.14 of ANSI Z136.1 mirror FLPPS requirements
compliance_gaps: No federal mandate requiring end users to utilize provided interlocks
DIY laser construction creates safety enforcement challenges
Gap between manufacturer requirements and user implementation
